title: Generation Request
description: Input contract for the provider-neutral `GenerationProvider.generateStructured` boundary. Orchestration code constructs one of these, not a provider-specific payload.

constraints.description: Balance, format, and safety constraints the generator must respect.

seed.description: Best-effort reproducibility hint passed to providers that support seeded output. NOT a determinism guarantee — provider output may be non-deterministic regardless (temperature drift, model version rotation). Determinism in this pipeline begins at Stage 4 onward, once content is shape- and coherence-validated. See `docs/architecture/ai-generation-pipeline.md` § Determinism boundary.

providerHints.description: Opaque provider hints. Orchestration never reads this; adapters translate it to vendor-specific params.
